S.FORM: smyus kay' 'tayal qu pslkawtas hya' ga "smyus" sawn naha'.
S.PHON: s~ɕmjus~ɕ kajʔ ʔtajal qu ps~ɕlkawtas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa "s~ɕmjus~ɕ" s~ɕawn naħaʔ.
S.FORM: smyus kay' 'tayal qu pslkawtas hya' ga "smyus" sawn naha'.
S.PHON: s~ɕmjus~ɕ kajʔ ʔtajal qu ps~ɕlkawtas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa "s~ɕmjus~ɕ" s~ɕawn naħaʔ.
